title: Webinar: Build a monday.com client portal with Softr by Mindflows
excerpt: Are you looking to create a seamless, user-friendly client portal that integrates with Monday.com? Join Mindflows, a certified Monday.com Bronze Partner and Softr Partner, as we guide you through building a fully functio…

posts.author: Rochelle.L (Rochelle Lentfer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you looking to create a seamless, user-friendly client portal that integrates with Monday.com? Join Mindflows, a certified Monday.com Bronze Partner and Softr Partner, as we guide you through building a fully functional client portal using Softr, directly integrated with your Monday.com workflows.

In this webinar, we will cover step-by-step how to create a client portal that enhances collaboration, automates processes, and provides clients with real-time access to key project information—without the need for complex coding!

Who Should Attend?

  • Business owners and entrepreneurs using Monday.com
  • Project managers looking to streamline client communication
  • Developers seeking no-code solutions for Monday.com integrations
  • Anyone interested in maximizing the potential of Monday.com and Softr

What You’ll Learn

  • The essentials of Monday.com and Softr integration
  • How to design and launch a fully customizable client portal
  • Best practices for automating client communications and project tracking
  • Real-world examples and templates you can apply to your own business

Don’t miss this opportunity to take your Monday.com setup to the next level with a client portal that enhances client satisfaction and operational efficiency.

As a certified Monday.com Bronze Partner and Softr Partner, Mindflows has the expertise to help you unlock the full potential of these powerful platforms. Whether you’re a Monday.com pro or just getting started, this webinar will give you the tools to create a client portal that drives success.

Register now and secure your spot!

Free Softr Trial: Softr Studio
